skills.name: React Component Builder
skills.description: Scaffold production-ready React components with TypeScript, props, and tests.
skills.promptPreview: Generate a React component named [Name] with TypeScript props interface, default export, and a Jest test stub.

skills.name: Git Workflow Automator
skills.description: Create branching strategies, PR templates, and commit message conventions for teams.
skills.promptPreview: Design a Git branching strategy for a team of [N] developers working on [project type]. Include branch naming, PR template, and commit conventions.

skills.name: TypeScript Type Generator
skills.description: Generate complex TypeScript types, generics, and utility types from plain-English descriptions.
skills.useCase: Create precise type definitions without manual typing
skills.promptPreview: Generate TypeScript types for [domain model]. Include generics, mapped types, and conditional types where appropriate.
